prompt: A cozy antique bookstore interior with towering dark wooden bookshelves crammed with old books on both sides, warm lamplight, framed vintage maps and artwork on the upper walls, and a narrow aisle leading deeper into the shop. To the left, a reading nook with a worn leather armchair and a small side table stacked with hardcovers sits beneath a wall-mounted antique clock. To the right, a glass display cabinet holds rare first editions and collectible maps, next to the front door with a brass bell. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking down the narrow aisle between bookshelves toward the center display table.

tracking_object.desc: large brass globe on a wooden stand on the display table

scene_adherence.visible_part: A cozy antique bookstore interior has towering dark wooden bookshelves crammed with old books on both sides, warm lamplight, framed vintage maps and artwork on the upper walls, and a narrow aisle leading deeper into the shop.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left, a reading nook with a worn leather armchair and a small side table stacked with hardcovers sits beneath a wall-mounted antique clock. To the right, a glass display cabinet holds rare first editions and collectible maps, next to the front door with a brass bell.
